summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of EPIC 5 - POS E-Commerce experience. All major features tested and verified working correctly including login, navigation, discover filters, product cards, persistent cart, 3-step checkout, create customer modal, reorder strip, and product detail advanced view.
passed_tests: Login with sales@kainnusantara.id / demo12345 credentials
Navigation to POS/Sales Portal via PENJUALAN sidebar group
Sales Portal view loaded with facet rail and product grid (7 products)
Search filter - filtered products by 'batik' keyword
Category filter chips - toggle functionality working
Sort dropdown - 'Harga ↑' (Price ascending) applied successfully
Availability dropdown - 'Tersedia' (Available) filter applied
Price range filter - min/max inputs (50k-200k) working
Reset filters button - cleared all active filters
Product card qty stepper - increment/decrement working (1 → 2)
Product card unit select - present and functional
Product card stock badge - displaying 'Tersedia' (Available)
Product card price display - showing 'Rp 185.000/meter'
Product card add to cart button - successfully added item
Floating cart button appeared with badge count (1) and subtotal (Rp 370.000)
Checkout drawer opened on cart button click
Checkout Step 1 - customer selection working
Checkout Step 1 - address selection working
Checkout Step 1 - next button navigation to Step 2
Checkout Step 2 - cart items displayed (7 items)
Checkout Step 2 - cart item qty editable
Checkout Step 2 - cart item unit select present
Checkout Step 2 - payment term select present
Checkout Step 2 - next button navigation to Step 3
Checkout Step 3 - grand total displayed (Rp 410.700)
Checkout Step 3 - credit status banner present (credit blocked)
Checkout Step 3 - back button navigation working
Checkout Step 3 - submit button correctly disabled due to credit block
Create customer modal opened from checkout Step 1
Create customer modal - all form fields present (name, PIC, phone, city, address)
Create customer modal - all fields fillable
Create customer modal - submit button enabled when all required fields filled
Create customer modal - close button working
Reorder strip present with 4 frequently bought items for selected customer
Reorder strip quick-add button working (added prod_lurik_classic)
Product detail panel opened on detail button click
Product detail advanced toggle - expand/collapse functionality working
Product detail advanced - stock breakdown by warehouse (3 warehouses shown)
Product detail advanced - ownership matrix present with entity/lot/warehouse details
Product detail panel close button working
